# CWE-1289 safe: canonical path prefix check
lang: go
file: CWE-1289-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1289 mitigated: cleaned path must remain under the public assets directory.

import (
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func FetchSharedAssetSafe() gin.HandlerFunc {
	root := "/srv/assets/public"
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		requested := c.Param("path")
		clean := filepath.Clean(filepath.Join(root, requested))
		if !strings.HasPrefix(clean, root+string(filepath.Separator)) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "blocked"})
			return
		}
		if strings.Contains(clean, "private") {
			c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "blocked"})
			return
		}
		c.File(clean)
	}
}
